name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour in Mattin AI

labels: bug

---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is. What did you expect to happen? What actually happened?

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Send request to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

Describe what actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots where relevant.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Mattin AI version | e.g. 0.3.18 |
| Deployment | Docker / Local dev |
| Browser (if frontend) | e.g. Chrome 122 |
| Python version (if backend) | e.g. 3.12 |
| LLM provider (if applicable) | e.g. OpenAI / Anthropic |
| Vector DB (if applicable) | e.g. PGVector / Qdrant |

## Logs / Stack Trace

```
Paste any relevant logs or tracebacks here.
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. related issues, workarounds you have tried, frequency of occurrence).
